summary: Iteration 2 testing complete for Turonlimo new features (luggage, child_seat, additional_stops, return_trip + return_location, new sections, footer updates, navbar Text button). All 22 backend pytest cases pass (18 from iter 1 + 4 new for iter 2 fields). Frontend booking form with all new fields submits successfully and persists correctly. Admin dashboard correctly displays new indicators (+ CHILD SEAT, ROUND TRIP, +N stops, N bags). All new sections (HowItWorks, ServiceFeatures, About, Events, ThingsToDo) render with correct data-testids. Footer shows social icons (Facebook/Instagram/YouTube/Yelp), 2 office addresses, Text us link. Navbar Text button has href starting with sms:.
critical_code_review_comments: BookingForm.jsx: clicking the parent <label> for child-seat-toggle/return-toggle works because it wraps Checkbox/Switch — fine, but be aware that nested label+Radix can sometimes double-fire onCheckedChange in Safari. Consider htmlFor or explicit click-to-toggle handler if any cross-browser issue.

BookingForm validation logic at line 87 (return_trip true but blank return_location) is enforced client-side only. Backend accepts empty return_location with return_trip=true (no validator). Minor inconsistency — consider adding @model_validator on BookingCreate.
Footer.jsx: SOCIALS array uses placeholder URLs like https://facebook.com (no actual brand handle). Pre-launch, replace with real social handles.
Navbar.jsx: nav-text-button href is hard-coded to sms:+15555555555 (placeholder). Pull from env or shared CONTACT_PHONE constant alongside Footer/Hero phones for a single source of truth.
Backend Booking model: pickup_date / pickup_time still raw strings without format validation (carry-over from iter 1).
CORS allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True remains (carry-over from iter 1 review).
seed_data_creation: Created 'TEST UI Iter2' booking via UI with all new fields (luggage=4, child_seat=true, additional_stops=['Schramsberg'], return_trip=true, return_location='Hotel Drisco'). Pytest TEST_-prefixed bookings/contacts cleaned up by lifecycle tests; the new-fields tests also clean up via DELETE.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_turonlimo_api.py -v. Class TestBookingNewFields covers luggage/child_seat/stops/return_trip/return_location create + persistence + backward compat. Frontend flow: scroll into booking-section first; for child seat, click the [data-testid="booking-child-seat-toggle"] label wrapper (not the inner Checkbox); for return toggle, click [data-testid="booking-return-toggle"] label wrapper. Conditional [data-testid="booking-return-location"] appears only after return-toggle is on. Admin dashboard badges are UPPERCASE ('+ CHILD SEAT', 'ROUND TRIP', '+1 stop', '4 bags') — match accordingly.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All Iteration 2 acceptance criteria met end-to-end. Backwards compatibility for bookings without new fields is verified both at the API level (defaults applied) and UI level (older rows in admin dashboard render with no badges).
